title: Cozy Smoky Chicken Tikka Masala
description: A comforting and aromatic Indian-inspired dish, with tender chicken in a rich smoky tomato sauce, served over casabe. Perfect for a cozy dinner.
instructions: Season the chicken with cozy spices blend, smoky paprika, salt, and black pepper.
Heat ghee or oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat. Sear the chicken until browned on both sides, about 5-6 minutes. Transfer to a baking dish.
In the same skillet, add sliced french onion and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add diced tomato to the skillet and cook until the mixture is fragrant and slightly caramelized, about 5 minutes.
Pour the tomato mixture over the chicken in the baking dish.
Top with grated gratin cheese and crushed casabe.
Bake in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the cheese is melted and golden brown.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh cilantro or scallions if desired.
